attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
STGO.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL_KEY,
STGO.SHIP_DT,
STGO.PRODUCT_QTY,
STGO.CREATE_DTM,
STGO.DV_CREATE_DT,
STGO.RETURN_REASON_CD,
STGO.PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
STGO.SK_MESSAGE_ID,
STGO.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT,
STGO.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_KEY,
STGO.PRODUCT_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
STGO.PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY,
STGO.BK_CARTON_ID,
STGO.ACTION_CODE,
 CASE WHEN NRPBD.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE
 FROM 
 (
SELECT 
 SRPBD.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL_KEY,
  MESSAGE_ID          as    SK_MESSAGE_ID,
 NRPB.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_KEY AS RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_KEY,          
CASE WHEN  PROCESS_STATUS  = 'C' THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN PROCESS_STATUS = 'E' THEN 'ERROR' WHEN PROCESS_STATUS  = 'N' THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(STG.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))    AS CREATE_DTM,
CAST(STG.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)  AS DV_CREATE_DT, 
NRPB.BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY as PRODUCT_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
 NIIT.ITEM_KEY  AS PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY   ,
CASE STG.RETURN_REASON_CODE WHEN 'UPA' THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
WHEN 'CCO' THEN 'CANCEL' WHEN 'DPS' THEN 'RECALL' WHEN 'DPR' THEN
 'DAMAGE' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RETURN_REASON_CD,  
  PID_LINE_ID       AS SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT,
 COALESCE(NSC.BK_CARTON_ID,'UNKNOWN')  AS    BK_CARTON_ID ,
 COALESCE(CAST(STG.PRODUCT_QUANTITY AS INTEGER),0)  AS  PRODUCT_QTY,
 CAST(STG.SHIP_DATE AS DATE)  AS SHIP_DT, 
 STG.ACTION_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2ALNS_IFACE STG
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL SRPBD
  ON STG.MESSAGE_ID=SRPBD.SK_MESSAGE_ID
  AND STG.PID_LINE_ID=SRPBD.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT
 INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS  NRPB
  ON STG.MESSAGE_ID=NRPB.SK_MESSAGE_ID
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT
  ON STG.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NIIT.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT     
  AND NRPB.BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY=NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPMENT_CARTON  NSC          
  ON STG.HOLDING_UNIT_ID    =NSC.BK_CARTON_ID    
UNION ALL
SELECT 
 SRPBD.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL_KEY,
  MESSAGE_ID          as    SK_MESSAGE_ID,
 NRPB.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_KEY AS RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_KEY,          
CASE WHEN  PROCESS_STATUS  = 'C' THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN PROCESS_STATUS = 'E' THEN 'ERROR' WHEN PROCESS_STATUS  = 'N' THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(EX.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))    AS CREATE_DTM,
CAST(EX.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)  AS DV_CREATE_DT,  
NRPB.BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY as PRODUCT_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
 NIIT.ITEM_KEY  AS PRODUCT_ITEM_KEY   ,
CASE EX.RETURN_REASON_CODE WHEN 'UPA' THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
WHEN 'CCO' THEN 'CANCEL' WHEN 'DPS' THEN 'RECALL' WHEN 'DPR' THEN
 'DAMAGE' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS RETURN_REASON_CD,  
  PID_LINE_ID       AS SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT,
 COALESCE(NSC.BK_CARTON_ID,'UNKNOWN')  AS    BK_CARTON_ID ,
 COALESCE(CAST(EX.PRODUCT_QUANTITY AS INTEGER),0)  AS  PRODUCT_QTY,
 CAST(EX.SHIP_DATE AS DATE)  AS SHIP_DT, 
 EX.ACTION_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2ALNS_IFACE EX
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL SRPBD
  ON EX.MESSAGE_ID=SRPBD.SK_MESSAGE_ID
  AND EX.PID_LINE_ID=SRPBD.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT
 INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS  NRPB
  ON EX.MESSAGE_ID=NRPB.SK_MESSAGE_ID
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT 
  ON EX.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NIIT.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT     
  AND NRPB.BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY=NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPMENT_CARTON  NSC          
  ON EX.HOLDING_UNIT_ID    =NSC.BK_CARTON_ID
  )STGO  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL NRPBD  
ON ( NRPBD.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL_KEY  = STGO.RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL_KEY)

SELECT  
RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMP.MESSAGE_ID,SMP.PID_LINE_ID ) + MAX_VAL RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL_KEY,
SMP.MESSAGE_ID AS SK_MESSAGE_ID, 
 SMP.PID_LINE_ID      AS SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT
    FROM  
	(SELECT COALESCE (MAX (RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
	FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL ) SMPO,
	( 
	SELECT STG.MESSAGE_ID,STG.PID_LINE_ID
	FROM(
	SELECT
  MESSAGE_ID       ,  PID_LINE_ID   ,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,HOLDING_UNIT_ID
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2ALNS_IFACE  
UNION ALL
SELECT
   MESSAGE_ID       ,  PID_LINE_ID   ,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,HOLDING_UNIT_ID 
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2ALNS_IFACE  
)STG
INNER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS  NRPB
  ON STG.MESSAGE_ID=NRPB.SK_MESSAGE_ID
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT
  ON STG.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NIIT.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT    
  AND NRPB.BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY=NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPMENT_CARTON  NSC          
  ON STG.HOLDING_UNIT_ID    =NSC.BK_CARTON_ID
	) SMP	
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
	(
	SELECT 
	1 
	FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL SMPO
	WHERE SMPO.SK_MESSAGE_ID = SMP.MESSAGE_ID
	AND   SMPO.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT=SMP.PID_LINE_ID
    	)

SELECT 
PID_LINE_ID,
REQUEST_ID,
CREATION_DATE,
CREATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
MESSAGE_ID,
HOLDING_UNIT_ID,
LINE_NUMBER,
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
ITEM_NUMBER,
ITEM_REVISION,
PRODUCT_QUANTITY,
RETURN_REASON_CODE,
UOM,
SHIP_DATE,
B2B_MFG_STATUS,
RETRY_COUNT,
PROCESS_STATUS,
ATTRIBUTE1,
ATTRIBUTE2,
ATTRIBUTE3,
ATTRIBUTE4,
ATTRIBUTE5,
ATTRIBUTE6,
ATTRIBUTE7,
ATTRIBUTE8,
ATTRIBUTE9,
ATTRIBUTE10,
ATTRIBUTE11,
ATTRIBUTE12,
ATTRIBUTE13,
ATTRIBUTE14,
ATTRIBUTE15,
GES_UPDATE_DATE,
GLOBAL_NAME,
BATCH_ID,
ACTION_CODE,
CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
(
SELECT 

STG.PID_LINE_ID,
STG.REQUEST_ID,
STG.CREATION_DATE,
STG.CREATED_BY,
STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
STG.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
STG.MESSAGE_ID,
STG.HOLDING_UNIT_ID,
STG.LINE_NUMBER,
STG.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
STG.ITEM_NUMBER,
STG.ITEM_REVISION,
STG.PRODUCT_QUANTITY,
STG.RETURN_REASON_CODE,
STG.UOM,
STG.SHIP_DATE,
STG.B2B_MFG_STATUS,
STG.RETRY_COUNT,
STG.PROCESS_STATUS,
STG.ATTRIBUTE1,
STG.ATTRIBUTE2,
STG.ATTRIBUTE3,
STG.ATTRIBUTE4,
STG.ATTRIBUTE5,
STG.ATTRIBUTE6,
STG.ATTRIBUTE7,
STG.ATTRIBUTE8,
STG.ATTRIBUTE9,
STG.ATTRIBUTE10,
STG.ATTRIBUTE11,
STG.ATTRIBUTE12,
STG.ATTRIBUTE13,
STG.ATTRIBUTE14,
STG.ATTRIBUTE15,
STG.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
STG.GLOBAL_NAME,
STG.BATCH_ID,
STG.ACTION_CODE,
STG.CREATE_DATETIME
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_X_MK_3C8R2ALNS_IFACE STG
)STGO
WHERE NOT EXISTS
( 
SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT  SK_MESSAGE_ID,SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS_DTL )SP
WHERE STGO.MESSAGE_ID=SP.SK_MESSAGE_ID
AND STGO.PID_LINE_ID=SP.SK_PID_LINE_ID_INT
)
OR NOT EXISTS
( 
SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT  SK_MESSAGE_ID FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS )SP
WHERE STGO.MESSAGE_ID=SP.SK_MESSAGE_ID
)
OR NOT EXISTS
( 
SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT  SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT, BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT
, $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_RETURN_PRODUCTS_TO_BTS  NRPB
							WHERE NRPB.BTS_PARTNER_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY= NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY)SP
WHERE STGO.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=SP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
)
OR NOT EXISTS
( 
SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT  BK_CARTON_ID FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPMENT_CARTON )SP
WHERE STGO.HOLDING_UNIT_ID=SP.BK_CARTON_ID
)
